text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our journey to the Classics begins this year. We
decide to meet up to make our New Year's
resolutions, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Do I really have to make a resolution, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Resolutions are something you make when you
wanna work hard or accomplish something, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But I've only come this far 'cause I've already
been working as hard as I can. And I have to keep
it up if I wanna get to the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll be racing against other racers that debuted in
the same year as me though.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...So nothing's really changing.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wonder if I'll end up getting bored again...
choice_data_list:
What about making a resolution that's not
about racing?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Is it okay for me to do that?
choice_data_list:
Of course. It's a New Year's resolution, not a
racing resolution.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: W-well... In that case, I wanna go on lots of dates!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And I wanna learn lots of grown-up things from
you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, it's perfect! You're the one who told me I
could make any resolution! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So that's it, I've made my decision! My resolution
will be to go on lots of dates!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha. I love you, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's mood does a total one-eighty,
and a smile spreads across her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think seeing things from a different perspective
will be good for her. Maybe one day, she'll have a
truly heart-fluttering experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And for that reason...
choice_data_list: Let's go on that date right away!
Let's go on that date right away!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Are you serious?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! A New Year's date! ☆ Where should we
go?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oooh, great idea!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But there's no time to waste! ♪ Let's go buy some
lucky bags! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ♪ Let's keep this date going until the sun
goes down. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no sign that this shopping trip will end
before sunset...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ☆ I'll have to tell Fuji I won't be going home
tonight. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Of course, even I know when to put my foot
down. I wrap things up and escort Mayano Top
Gun back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: New Year's food... Like a lunch date?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sounds good! Anything's fun when I'm with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Is it really okay for me to be here? This place has
got serious grown-up vibes...

text_block_list.name: Japanese Restaurant Hostess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, aren't you a cutie. Come on inside and
take a seat.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Um... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy my lunch date with a nervous Mayano Top
Gun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Great idea! ♪ It's perfect for New Year's. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Maya comes in for the landing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait a second. What are you gonna pray for?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, that's no fun! Spill it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I pray that Mayano Top Gun's wishes
may one day be fulfilled.
